case_title: CITIBANK, N.A., VS. PING-PING Y LEUNG

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITIBANK, N.A., RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEUNG, PING-PING Y $8,144.37 PRINCIPAL, $301.02 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,445.39, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 77501573)
